text.title: Embedding Models Core Rules
text.summary: 12 testable rules + 2 terminal conclusions every model-selection artefact must enforce.

rule.statement: OpenAI batch response sorted by `item.index` before mapping back to inputs.
rule.rationale: Response order is not guaranteed; skipping sort produces misaligned embeddings.

rule.statement: `dimensions` parameter only valid for `text-embedding-3-*`; applying to `ada-002` rejected.
Mistral embed has 512-token context on some versions. Pre-chunk longer texts; do not rely on silent truncation.
Cohere embed-v3 MUST receive `input_type` per call. Generic default degrades NDCG 5–10%.
rule.rationale: Asymmetric input types are a tuning lever.

rule.statement: SentenceTransformer instantiated once per process. Multiple instances on same GPU OOM.
BGE-M3 sparse embeddings are `dict[token → weight]`, not dense arrays. Adapt or use a sparse-capable DB.
rule.rationale: Mismatch silently fails on dense-only DB clients.

rule.statement: Pin exact `model_name` + `model_version`. Providers silently update weights.
rule.rationale: Unpinned models invalidate cached vectors silently.

rule.statement: Use MTEB retrieval (not aggregate) score for ranking candidates.
rule.rationale: Aggregate over 56 tasks misleads when only retrieval matters.

rule.statement: For OpenAI text-embedding-3, start with `dimensions=512`; bench vs 1536/3072 before paying for storage.
rule.rationale: 512 captures ~98% of quality at 6.7x storage savings vs 3072.

rule.statement: Use `search_document` at index time and `search_query` at query time for Cohere/Voyage. Asymmetric embedding boosts NDCG 5–10%.
rule.rationale: Asymmetric models are trained for this split.

rule.statement: Pre-normalize vectors to unit length when cosine intended. Dot product then equals cosine and is faster.
rule.rationale: Normalized cosine = dot product; faster compute.

rule.statement: Store `model_name + version` per vector. Lets partial re-embedding on deprecation.
rule.rationale: Single-model collection metadata forces full re-embed; per-vector lets gradual migration.

rule.statement: New project OR provider migration AND bench set available → run the 5-step selection procedure.
Existing model meets recall target AND no migration pending → skip; reuse selection.
